ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-14-2023 Continued To Sep-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Seth Scootsky appearing via zoom for Richard Caplin(petitioner).

Mr. Scootsky stated that he needs more time to file the final distribution. Status on close of estate is continued to September 18, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-12-2023 Continued To Aug-14-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jun-12-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-08-2023 Continued To Jun-12-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to Richard Caplin (Executor) and E. Mark Himelstein (attorney) to appear on June 12, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. An Order to show will be issued to E. Mark Himelstein (attorney) to appear on June 12, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge; Ross Moody; Clerk: Ateesh Datt; Deputy: Choi; Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-18-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: E. Mark Himmelstein, in person, for and with Richard L. Caplin, Petitioner.

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Dec-08-2016 is admitted to probate. Richard L. Caplin is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May-08-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.
